hero.tagline: Hyper-personalized luxury travel, crafted for the few.

about.label: Our Story
about.heading: Two People. One Obsession.
about.subheading: We started Nomad Privé because the trips we wanted didn't exist.
about.body1: My partner studied Tourism & Hospitality at university. I spent years traveling with one rule: go where the tourists don't.
about.body2: Between us, we've built something neither of us could have alone — the academic foundation of hospitality and destination management, combined with the instinct of someone who has eaten street food at 2am in a Marrakesh medina and found the best surf break in Lombok before it had a name.
about.body3: We've been to 22+ countries across four continents. We know the difference between a hotel that looks beautiful on Instagram and one that actually changes how you feel. We have contacts — real ones, built over years — at boutique hotels, private villas, charter operators, and restaurants that don't take walk-ins.
about.body4: When something goes wrong on a trip (and something always does), we solve it before our clients notice it was a problem.

packages.label: Packages
packages.heading: The Experience Made for You
packages.tagline3: By referral only. For those who want the impossible.

footer.referral: We accept new clients exclusively through personal referrals.
footer.cta: Your next journey begins with a conversation.
footer.description: Hyper-personalized luxury travel for those who refuse the ordinary. Built on firsthand experience, run on real relationships.

quiz.title: Find Your Perfect Destination
quiz.subtitle: Answer 4 quick questions. We'll tell you where to go.
quiz.result: Based on your answers, this is your perfect journey.

packagesPage.heroSubheading: Three levels of service. One standard of excellence. Each package is a complete service — we handle every detail so you never have to.
packagesPage.calloutHeading: Drive the Road You've Always Dreamed Of
packagesPage.calloutBody: We ship your own luxury or sports car to any destination in Europe. Imagine your Ferrari on the Stelvio Pass. Your Porsche through the Swiss Alps. We handle the logistics — you handle the drive.

signature.description: For travelers who want every detail arranged without lifting a finger. We handle hotels, transfers, dining reservations and local experiences — all hand-selected.
signature.travelStyle: Business class flights, private ground transfers

prive.description: Everything in Signature, elevated. Private jet options, yacht charters, exclusive villa estates and a dedicated travel designer who becomes your personal expert for every trip.
prive.note: *We arrange transport of your own luxury vehicle to the destination

grandPrive.tagline: By referral only. For those who want the impossible.
grandPrive.description: There are no packages at this level — only possibilities. Reserved for clients referred by existing members. If you have to ask the price, this isn't for you.
includes: Your own sports car on the Stelvio Pass

aboutPage.heroSubheading: Nomad Privé is the answer to a question we kept asking: why doesn't a travel company exist that actually travels?
aboutPage.quote: We don't sell trips. We recreate moments we've already lived.
aboutPage.referralBody1: We don't advertise. We don't have a walk-in office. Every client we work with was introduced to us by someone we already trust.
aboutPage.referralBody2: This isn't gatekeeping — it's quality control. The trips we build take time, attention, and genuine care. We can only do that properly for a small number of clients at a time.
aboutPage.card1Body: Every destination we recommend is one we've personally experienced. We don't sell anywhere we haven't stood.
aboutPage.card2Body: Our network is built trip by trip. The villa manager in Positano. The riad owner in Marrakesh. The charter captain in the Aegean. Real relationships, not commission agreements.
aboutPage.card3Body: Travel has variables. Weather, strikes, overbooked hotels, missed connections. We solve problems before you know they exist — because we've already had them ourselves.

journalPage.heroSubheading: Honest notes from the destinations we know, love, and send our clients to.

destinationsPage.heroSubheading: Every destination we recommend is one we know personally. No lists, no aggregated rankings — only places we've been and believe in.
